news.headline: Apple sued for hosting child sexual abuse material, failing to protect survivors. Lawsuit filed for thousands of survivors.
news.summary: A significant legal case has been initiated on behalf of numerous survivors of child sexual abuse images and videos (CSAM) that were circulated on Apple platforms. The lawsuit was filed in Cupertino, California on December 8, 2024. It is a class action lawsuit representing thousands of individuals affected by this heinous crime.

news.headline: Bitcoin ETFs in the US hold over 1.1 million Bitcoin worth $110 billion, surpassing Satoshi Nakamoto's holdings.
news.summary: Bitcoin ETFs in the U.S. have now accumulated more Bitcoin than Satoshi Nakamoto, the creator of Bitcoin. As per CoinGlass data, as of Thursday's market close, these ETFs held a collective 1,105,690 Bitcoin valued at $110 billion. This milestone was achieved by 10 asset managers who started trading these products on January 11, except for Grayscale's Bitcoin Mini Trust. Nakamoto, who disappeared in 2011, is believed to have mined around 1.1 million Bitcoin in the project's initial seven months. The fact that Bitcoin ETFs now hold more Bitcoin than Nakamoto is a significant moment in the asset's history. This development underscores the growing presence of institutional investment in the cryptocurrency space.

news.headline: Affimed's study shows safety and efficacy of Acimtamig and AlloNK® in R/R cHL patients. 22 patients in the trial.
news.summary: In Mannheim, Germany, on December 8, 2024, Affimed N.V. (Nasdaq: AFMD), a clinical-stage immuno-oncology company, disclosed data at the 66th ASH Annual Meeting and Exposition through a poster session. The dataset unveiled information on 22 patients participating in the run-in phase of the LuminICE-203 (AFM13-203) phase 2 open-label, multicenter, multi-cohort study. The trial aims to assess the safety and efficacy of combining acimtamig (AFM13) with Artiva Biotherapeutics’ allogeneic NK cell AlloNK® in individuals with R/R cHL (relapsed or refractory classical Hodgkin lymphoma).

news.headline: Molecular Partners presents positive data on MP0533 study and MP0621 at ASH 2024, showing safety and antileukemic effects.
news.summary: The ongoing MP0533 phase 1/2a trial has shown promising results with a favorable safety profile. The study involves dose escalation and has showcased initial antileukemic effects along with positive pharmacodynamic activity. The trial has progressed smoothly so far, demonstrating encouraging outcomes in terms of safety and efficacy. The findings indicate potential benefits for individuals with leukemia, with further analysis and monitoring underway to gauge the full extent of these effects.

news.headline: Cogent Biosciences reports promising new data from Phase 2 APEX Trial for Bezuclastinib in AdvSM patients.
China's economy remains stable with 5.3% growth in Q1, 4.7% in Q2, and 4.6% in Q3 in 2024, as stated by People's Daily.
news.summary: In a retrospective of the Chinese economy's performance in 2024, it was observed that the country saw a 5.3 percent year-on-year growth in domestic GDP in the first quarter, followed by a 4.7 percent increase in the second quarter, and a 4.6 percent rise in the third quarter. These figures highlight the varying growth rates experienced throughout the year in different quarters.

news.headline: 11 large-cap stocks, including TPL (-16.35%), MCHP (-13.03%), INTC (-13.01%), KB (-12.68%), and others, were top losers last week.
news.summary: These eleven large-cap stocks have experienced notable declines in the past week, possibly impacting investors' portfolios. Texas Pacific Land Corporation (NYSE:TPL) saw a significant drop of 16.35%, potentially influenced by OPEC's supply decision. Microchip Technology Incorporated (NASDAQ:MCHP) shares plummeted by 13.03% following the company's decision to halt its application for U.S. semiconductor government grants and a reduction of revenue guidance for the December 2024 quarter. Intel Corporation (NASDAQ:INTC) experienced a dive of 13.01% after announcing the retirement of CEO Pat Gelsinger. KB Financial Group Inc (NYSE:KB) witnessed a decline of 12.68%. For more details, refer to the full story on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: DARZALEX FASPRO reduces progression risk by 51% in high-risk smoldering multiple myeloma patients. Aiming to prevent organ damage and improve survival rates.
news.summary: Johnson & Johnson has unveiled the initial subcutaneous anti-CD38 therapy, which has shown promising results in averting end-organ deterioration, and prolonging progression-free survival and overall survival. These outcomes are based on data obtained from the Phase 3 AQUILA study. The announcement was made on December 8, 2024, in San Diego. Johnson & Johnson is traded on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol JNJ.

Progress in preventing and treating blood cancers showcased at ASH Annual Meeting in San Diego on Dec. 8, 2024.
news.summary: Exciting developments in various stages of patient care offer optimism for individuals battling blood cancers. Recent research shared at the 66th American Society of Hematology (ASH) Annual Meeting and Exposition in San Diego on December 8, 2024, demonstrate significant advancements in both the prevention and treatment of these diseases. The studies reflect the potential for improvements in patient outcomes, showcasing a beacon of hope in the ongoing fight against blood cancers.

news.summary: On December 8, 2024, in Radnor, Pennsylvania, Kessler Topaz Meltzer & Check, LLP announced through PRNewswire that a securities class action lawsuit has been initiated against Wolfspeed, Inc. ("Wolfspeed") (NYSE: WOLF). This lawsuit is on behalf of individuals who bought or gained stake in Wolfspeed's securities. For more information, the law firm's website www.ktmc.com can be accessed.

Larry Summers criticizes idea of national Bitcoin reserve as "crazy." Summers believes crypto over-regulated, calls reserve concept unfeasible.
news.summary: Larry Summers, a former Treasury Secretary, has criticized the notion of a national Bitcoin reserve as "crazy" during discussions in Congress and the crypto sector. In an interview with Bloomberg, Summers expressed skepticism about the practicality of such a reserve, stating that although he believes cryptocurrencies face excessive regulation, a national Bitcoin reserve is not a feasible idea. Summers stated, "There are probably respects in which crypto has been over-regulated by overzealous regulators. But some of what is being said, this idea that we should have some kind of national bitcoin reserve, is crazy." The full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

Nasdaq approaching 20,000 mark, tech stocks signal buy; Nvidia, Meta in buy zones. Dow Jones Futures trends analyzed.

Notably, four major technology companies are showing signals that suggest it may be a good time to buy their stocks. These companies include Nvidia and Meta, which are currently in buy zones. news.headline: Family of Austin Tice, consisting of 17 relatives, hold prayer gathering at St. John's Church to advocate for his safe return.
news.summary: On December 8, 2024, in Washington, a total of 17 relatives of Austin Tice will be assembling at St. John's Church located at the intersection of 16th and H Street NW. They are uniting in prayer, appealing for the safe comeback of Austin Tice. Additionally, they are urging the U.S. Government to take immediate action to ensure the security and wellbeing of Austin Tice.

news.summary: CCP Games has recently released Founder Access packs for sale, as they prepare for the upcoming alpha launch scheduled for this week. Players can now purchase these packs to gain early access to the game. Stay tuned for further updates on this exciting development.

news.summary: Bitcoin has climbed back up to a value of over $100,000, XRP is also experiencing an increase, and Dogecoin surpassed $0.48 overnight for the first time in more than three years.

news.headline: Bitcoin's value hits $100K, moving from underground beginnings to widespread financial acceptance.
news.summary: In recent developments, the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.2%, the lowest it has been in over a decade. This decrease is attributed to the addition of 250,000 new jobs in various sectors. The labor force participation rate also saw an increase to 63.8%, reflecting more people actively seeking employment. Additionally, the average hourly earnings have risen by 3.2% compared to last year, indicating a positive trend in wage growth. These statistics highlight a strengthening economy and a favorable job market for job seekers.

Bitcoin reached an all-time high of $103,259 thanks to Trump's pro-crypto stance, leading to a 50% surge since Nov 5.
news.summary: Last week, the cryptocurrency giant Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) broke the $100,000 barrier, hitting an all-time high of $103,259 in what is believed to be a result of the perceived pro-crypto position of President-elect Donald Trump. Following Trump's election on November 5, Bitcoin's value has soared by nearly 50%, with expectations that the incoming administration will be the first to openly support cryptocurrencies. The President-elect's stance on crypto is projected to have broad impacts on investors, the dollar, taxes, federal regulations, Treasury bonds, and gold according to Barron's. Trump has expressed commitments to the crypto industry, with plans to establish a "strategic national Bitcoin stockpile" and form a crypto advisory council. For further details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

The city attracts a diverse group of young Gen Z explorers from around the world, including Russia.

TransMedics appoints new CFO Gerardo Hernandez, sets tighter 2024 revenue goals. Previous CFO will stay until March 31, 2025.
news.summary: Shares of TransMedics Group, Inc. (NASDAQ:TMDX) are experiencing a decrease in premarket trading today following the announcement of Gerardo Hernandez being appointed as the new Chief Financial Officer, effective from December 2, 2024. Hernandez will be taking over from Stephen Gordon, who will be staying on as a non-executive employee until March 31, 2025, to facilitate a smooth transition. Waleed Hassanein, M.D., the President and CEO, expressed his excitement about having Hernandez join the leadership team.

news.headline: AST SpaceMobile collaborated with Cadence to create AST5000 ASIC for BlueBird program, boosting processing bandwidth up to 10x for global satellite-based internet on smartphones.
news.summary: AST SpaceMobile, Inc. (NASDAQ: ASTS) has announced a partnership with Cadence Design Systems, Inc. (NASDAQ: CDNS) to advance its goal of providing global connectivity. The collaboration is focused on bringing fast space-based internet directly to smartphones, improving communication worldwide. Through their joint efforts, Cadence and AST SpaceMobile have created the AST5000 ASIC, a specialized low-power chip for AST's BlueBird program. This innovative ASIC offers ten times more processing bandwidth per satellite, leading the way for seamless cellular broadband services from space on a global scale. The AST5000 ASIC integration marks a significant milestone in expanding AST's capabilities.
